title: SECRETS INVENTORY + AUDIT
sprint: U2.7 — Omnidirectional Knowledge Graph + Self-Extending Discovery

audit_scanner.description: TypeScript scanner that queries Vercel REST API for both Chat and V2 projects plus VPS /etc/newleaf/.env

secrets_inventory.description: Masked JSON inventory showing which keys exist on which environment with sync status
secrets_inventory.verification: 101 unique keys, all values masked (first 4 + last 4 chars only)

secrets_ui_page.description: Admin-only UI page with Overview, Full Inventory, and Drift Report tabs
secrets_ui_page.verification: Renders at /library/secrets with masked values, sync status badges, search/filter
secrets_ui_page.auth: NextAuth session (regular user) or x-neptune-internal-token header

audit_api_endpoint.description: GET returns full inventory or drift report; POST triggers re-scan
audit_api_endpoint.verification: GET /api/secrets/audit?format=drift returns drift report with HTTP 200
audit_api_endpoint.auth: x-neptune-internal-token header or regular user session

master_documentation.description: Full documentation of all 101 secrets across all environments

env_fix_78.issue: NEPTUNE_V2_POSTGRES_URL=<shared from neptune-ui Supabase> had angle brackets + spaces, breaking shell sourcing
env_fix_78.fix: Set to properly quoted real Supabase URL

env_fix_79.fix: Set to properly quoted real value matching existing BETTER_AUTH_SECRET

proxy_bypass.description: Added /api/secrets/* to bearer-token bypass list so internal token auth works

library_tab.description: Added Secrets tab to main library page navigation

library_page.note: Redirects to auth when unauthenticated — correct behavior for admin-only page

dotenv_sourcing.note: Previously line 78 would cause sourcing errors. Now clean.

genuine_value_mismatch.explanation: Expected: V2 uses a different Slack workspace with a different channel ID
